rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI match (reference index 21) with no citation sentence or bibliographic text, so we cannot see how the 2015 paper is used in the 2019 article. While the topics differ (omnichannel delivery effects on sales vs. service-crisis effects on perceived service quality), both involve dynamic service-performance effects over time, so an incidental-only judgment is not safe from the provided evidence.
